name: NTAO Technician Offboarding Sequence
description: Complete NTAO operational offboarding sequence for departing technicians

steps.title: Territory Handover Coordination
steps.description: Coordinate territory handover to maintain service continuity

substeps.title: Identify coverage replacement
substeps.description: Determine temporary or permanent replacement for service territory

substeps.title: Redistribute active appointments
substeps.description: Reassign all active and scheduled appointments to other technicians

substeps.title: Update territory boundaries
substeps.description: Adjust territory boundaries to maintain optimal coverage

substeps.title: Deactivate dispatch system access
substeps.description: Remove technician access from dispatch and routing systems

substeps.title: Update operational capacity models
substeps.description: Adjust capacity planning to reflect reduced technician availability

substeps.title: Archive service history and performance data
substeps.description: Properly archive technician service history for record keeping

substeps.title: Notify operations management team
substeps.description: Inform operations team of technician departure and coverage adjustments
